title: ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. pseudodasyantha
intro: Ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. pseudodasyantha, also known as the Iranian daphne or Persian dill, is a plant species in the mint family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of essential oils, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. pseudodasyantha include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating coughs, colds, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate respiratory and gastrointestinal problems.
